filters.notes: null_code = index of empty string '' in stmt_dict.txt; skip rows where stmt maps to ''

per_slot.distinct_adsh: bitset(86135) — one per slot, ~10.7 KB each

data_structures.notes: Direct array O(1) lookup; no hashing needed for ≤14 groups. Bitset enables efficient parallel OR-merge for COUNT(DISTINCT).

parallelism.merge_rationale: T×G = 64×14 = 896 << 100K threshold; sequential merge of thread-local direct arrays is trivially fast
parallelism.distinct_merge: bitset OR across all thread-local bitsets per group slot

scan.mmap_strategy: mmap all 4 columns before parallel scan; MADV_SEQUENTIAL on each

dict_loading.stmt_dict: pre/stmt_dict.txt — load at runtime, NEVER hardcode codes (C2)
dict_loading.adsh_dict: adsh_global_dict.txt — NOT needed for query execution (adsh used as int32_t code only)
dict_loading.null_code_detection: int16_t null_code = find_code(stmt_dict, ''); if stmt_code == null_code → skip row

aggregates.name: num_filings
aggregates.accumulator: bitset(86135) per slot; popcount at output

aggregates.name: avg_line_num
aggregates.accumulator: int64_t sum_line + int64_t count_for_avg; divide at output

output.decode: decode stmt_code and rfile_code to strings via dict[code] before printing (C18)

correctness_notes: C2: Load stmt_dict and rfile_dict at runtime; never hardcode dictionary codes
C15: Hash/array key MUST include BOTH stmt_code AND rfile_code
C18: Decode dict codes to strings for CSV output
C20: Use std::fill not memset for multi-byte initialization of aggregation arrays
P20: Thread-local aggregation arrays mandatory; never use shared aggregation map
